Agent Ruler Documentation (Beta) ​

Welcome. This docs site is the practical handbook for running Agent Ruler without guesswork.

Search ​

Use the search box in the header or press Ctrl+K (Cmd+K on macOS).

Search is local/offline and indexes curated docs pages, headings, and body content.
